nasb.text: And it happened that while He was praying alone, the disciples were with Him, and He questioned them, saying, “Who do the people say that I am?”

esv.text: Now it happened that as he was praying alone, the disciples were with him. And he asked them, “Who do the crowds say that I am?”

cnv.text: 有一次耶穌獨自祈禱的時候，只有門徒和他在一起。他問他們：“人說我是誰？”

ccb.text: 有一次，耶稣独自祷告的时候，门徒也在旁边。 耶稣问他们：“人们说我是谁？”

csbs.text: 有一次，耶稣独自祷告的时候，门徒们和他在一起。耶稣问他们，说：“众人说我是谁？”
